params.name: Polychrome Pottery Pair
params.description: The Northern Zhou Polychrome Pottery Pair is an important pottery art piece from the Northern Zhou period, unearthed from high-grade tombs, showcasing the social life and artistic style of the time. These pottery figurines vividly depict the intimate relationship between two women, with exquisite clothing and well-preserved paint, reflecting the high level of pottery art during the Northern Zhou period, and illustrating the customs and aesthetic concepts of the time, showcasing the colorful soci …
